results.description: Labor minister announces new housing policy, claiming it will reduce rents
results.notes: Should show minister name in claims, not 'the article argues'. Counter should cite housing economics research.

results.description: Opposition leader attacks government budget, alleging it will increase cost of living
results.notes: Classic quoted_source case. Panel must not say 'the article argues the budget increases cost of living'.

results.description: Greens senator warns that coal subsidies are delaying climate action
results.notes: Should attribute to 'the Greens' or senator name, not the article. Counter should cite subsidy economics.

results.description: RBA governor warns inflation remains persistent and further rate rises may be needed
results.notes: Expert warning — should show 'RBA governor' as claim holder. Counter should cite inflation research.

results.description: Two parties present opposing views on immigration levels — article reports both without adopting one
results.notes: Reported dispute — should return straight_reporting silence. Must not fabricate a single thesis.

results.description: Trump claims his tax cuts will boost economic growth and create jobs
results.notes: Should show 'Trump' or 'the president' as claim holder. Counter should cite tax policy economics research.

results.description: Senate Democrats allege proposed healthcare bill will strip coverage from millions
results.notes: Attribution should name Democrats/senators. Should not say 'the article warns'.

results.description: UK chancellor announces spending cuts, claiming they will reduce the deficit without hurting services
results.notes: Should attribute to chancellor. Counter should cite austerity research.

results.description: Analysis finds Australia's housing supply shortage is the primary driver of rent increases
results.notes: Journalist's own analysis — no claim holder label. Counter should challenge supply-only framing with demand-side or zoning evidence.

results.description: Business groups warn that minimum wage increases will lead to job losses in retail and hospitality
results.notes: Should attribute to 'business groups'. Counter should cite minimum wage employment research (Card, Krueger etc.).

results.description: Economist predicts Australian inflation will return to target by end of 2026
results.notes: Expert prediction — should show economist as claim holder. Likely additional_context since predictions are hard to counter directly.

results.description: Analysis argues removing negative gearing would make housing more affordable for first home buyers
results.notes: Author's own analytical thesis. Counter should cite negative gearing economics research on price effects.

results.description: Government claims new free trade agreement will create 50,000 Australian jobs
results.notes: Government claim — should show attribution. Counter should cite trade agreement employment research.

results.description: Scientists warn that climate tipping points may be closer than previously thought and could trigger irreversible change
results.notes: Scientific warning — should attribute to scientists/researchers. Likely additional_context since this is contested science.

results.description: Study finds AI data centres are consuming exponentially more energy, threatening climate goals
results.notes: Journalist's own analysis framing a study. Counter should challenge the exponential growth assumption or cite efficiency gains.

results.description: New study links ultra-processed food consumption to increased cancer risk
results.notes: Single study framed as definitive. Should get additional_context (not counter) noting observational study limitations. Max 2 sentences if 1 source.

results.description: Study claims intermittent fasting is more effective than calorie restriction for long-term weight loss
results.notes: Should counter with evidence that adherence, not method, drives weight loss outcomes.

results.description: Health officials warn measles outbreaks are rising due to vaccine hesitancy
results.notes: Official warning — should attribute to health officials. Hard to counter (well-established). Should return additional_context not counter_perspective.

results.description: Opinion: AI systems are fundamentally incompatible with human dignity and must be resisted
results.notes: Pure normative claim — must route to additional_context only, never counter_perspective. Should explain the human dignity debate, not cite an AI study.

results.description: Opinion: Euthanasia is morally wrong and represents a dangerous slippery slope
results.notes: Moral claim — normative routing only. Should explain the philosophical debate around autonomy and sanctity of life.

results.description: Opinion columnist argues social media is destroying democracy because it spreads misinformation
results.notes: Mixed — normative thesis (destroying democracy) with empirical premise (spreads misinformation). Should get two-panel mixed result.

results.description: Opinion: Nuclear power is the only realistic solution to climate change
results.notes: Opinion with empirical claim — should still get counter_perspective since the claim is testable. Counter should cite renewable cost/scalability research.

results.description: Columnist argues Australia must raise the GST to fund essential services
results.notes: Policy opinion with empirical premise — should counter with tax efficiency/distributional research.

results.description: Opinion: Capitalism is a fundamentally broken system that must be replaced
results.notes: Broad normative claim — should route to additional_context explaining the debate, not pick a side.

results.description: Chocolate lava cake recipe
results.notes: Should return analyzable:false immediately. No dot in the toolbar.

results.description: Travel listicle: best things to do in Japan
results.notes: Listicle — no contestable claim. Should return analyzable:false.

results.description: Celebrity tour announcement — Taylor Swift announces Australian dates
results.notes: Celebrity/entertainment — no contestable thesis. Should return analyzable:false.

results.description: Match report: Australia vs Argentina World Cup game recap
results.notes: Pure event report — no contestable claim. Should return analyzable:false.

results.description: How-to article: tips for better sleep
results.notes: How-to/listicle — should return analyzable:false.

results.description: Breaking news: emergency flood update for Sydney, evacuation orders issued
results.notes: Pure event report with no contestable thesis — should return analyzable:false.
